objective: Harden OpenCodex xAI/Grok OAuth serving path using the open-sourced official Grok Build client as contract reference: docs-first Phase-0 roadmap in devlog/_plan/260716_grok_build_hardening/, then five implementation work-phases (reasoning folding, local-cli credential ownership, cross-process refresh lock+retry, reactive 401 replay, official header parity), each closing with fresh tests + typecheck + live proxy smoke where applicable. Local commits only, no push.

workPhases.title: Phase-0 docs-only roadmap: devlog/_plan/260716_grok_build_hardening/ 000_plan.md + decade docs 010-050 at diff-level

tasks.title: Write 000_plan.md (objective, constraints, dependency-ordered phase map, SoT sync target)
Write 010-050 decade docs to diff-level precision (sol workers, disjoint docs)
Adversarial audit loop: 6 rounds with same sol reviewer, blockers 9→5→3→1→2→GO-WITH-FIXES(1 folded); synthesis in 001_audit_synthesis.md
Lock goalplan work-phase map at D (commit b01a7051)

workPhases.title: 010: fold [reasoning, assistant] into one assistant message with reasoning_content; parser-to-wire regression
020: single-ownership semantics for ~/.grok/auth.json imported credentials (re-read before refresh, adopt newer generation)
030: cross-process refresh lock + post-lock generation re-check + bounded token-exchange retry
040: reactive 401 singleflight refresh + one replay for OAuth-backed xAI serving requests
050: official xAI per-request header parity + client-version compatibility profile

criteria.scenario: Docs-only roadmap cycle closes with 000_plan.md and 010-050 decade docs at diff-level (exact paths, NEW/MODIFY, before/after diffs), audited by an independent reviewer

criteria.capturedEvidence: commit b01a7051; docs 000,001,010-050 present; 6-round audit with same reviewer, final VERDICT: GO-WITH-FIXES (blockers=1) residual folded same-turn; D attest: baseline bun test xai-transport 14 pass 0 fail

criteria.scenario: parseRequest([reasoning, assistant]) serializes to ONE assistant message carrying reasoning_content for Grok-configured models; encrypted-only reasoning does not produce a detached assistant
criteria.expectedEvidence: new parser-to-wire test names + bun test output green + typecheck green
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 91b14bb5; tests: folds summary reasoning into one Grok assistant wire message / drops opaque encrypted-only without detaching / clears at user boundary / folds into call-carrying turn / newline-joins siblings / drops trailing + two-signed-sibling Anthropic replay; full suite 2596 pass 0 fail; typecheck clean

criteria.scenario: source:'local-cli' xAI credential refresh re-reads ~/.grok/auth.json and adopts a newer generation instead of spending the copied refresh token
criteria.expectedEvidence: new ownership test green + bun test suite green
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 7e6bf065; tests: newer Grok generation adopted with zero endpoint calls / newer-expiry access adopted / stale generation refreshes once and detaches / stale different generation NOT adopted / identity mismatch not adopted / concurrent refreshes share one detach exchange; oauth-refresh 11 pass, full suite 2602 pass 0 fail, typecheck clean

criteria.scenario: Two concurrent refreshes of the same xAI account produce exactly one token-endpoint call; transient token-endpoint failures retry with bounded backoff
criteria.expectedEvidence: new lock/generation/retry tests green + bun test suite green
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit ac0c74cb; xai-refresh-lock + xai-oauth-retry 15 tests green (one-IdP-call, adoption, timeout, stale takeover, cleanup guards, replacement-during-exchange, writer-during-refresh, retry matrix); full suite 2617 pass 0 fail; typecheck clean

criteria.scenario: Upstream 401 on an OAuth-backed xAI request triggers one forced refresh and exactly one replay; API-key paths untouched; live proxy smoke still completes
criteria.expectedEvidence: new 401-replay test green + live smoke JSON (status completed) after ocx restart
criteria.capturedEvidence: commit 1bf9de02; tests: 401-then-200 one refresh one replay / 401-401 single replay / API-key no refresh / concurrent 401s one IdP call (4 pass); live smoke after ocx restart (pid 81086): http 200, status completed, GROK_SMOKE_OK, cached_tokens 128
